entry.title: Current Conditions: Mainly Sunny, 12.3°C
entry.summary:
Observed at: Edmonton Int'l Airport 2:00 PM MDT Friday 17 April 2026
Condition: Mainly Sunny
Temperature: 12.3°C
Pressure / Tendency: 101.5 kPa / falling
Visibility: 24 km
Humidity: 38 %
Dewpoint: -2.1°C
Wind: W 18 km/h

entry.title: Friday night: Periods of rain. Low plus 4.
entry.summary:
Forecast issued 3:30 PM MDT Friday 17 April 2026
Periods of rain. Amount 5 to 10 mm. Wind south 20 km/h. Low plus 4.

entry.title: Saturday: A mix of sun and cloud. High 16.
entry.summary:
Forecast issued 3:30 PM MDT Friday 17 April 2026
A mix of sun and cloud. Wind south 30 km/h becoming west 20 late in the afternoon. High 16.

entry.title: Saturday night: Cloudy periods. Low minus 2.
entry.summary: Cloudy periods. Wind west 20 km/h. Low minus 2.
